name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-41
title: Vocabulary-convention examples cite retired --human-approval-gate flag in spec.md
description: contract/docs/spec/spec.md uses the retired --human-approval-gate true|false flag as the canonical example in its 'Boolean flag vocabulary' section (lines ~180-202). Since the flag was removed from dispatch-tdd-subagent.py in tdd-subagent v5.0.0 (TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-19), the example is stale. Replace with a still-existing flag of the same shape — candidates: --code-review-full-loop (binary present/absent), --max-iterations N (value-bearing). Pick one that demonstrates the true/false convention. The vocabulary RULE itself (PREFER true/false, AVOID enabled/disabled) is still valid; only the example needs updating. Cosmetic, low priority.
